turns.text: Hi! Let's start simple. Do you know what HTML is?
Yes. HTML is the language we use to make web pages. We use it to add text, images, and buttons to a page.
Good. And what is CSS used for?
CSS makes the page look nice. We use it to add colors, change the size of text, and put things in the right place.
Have you used JavaScript before? Can you tell me something it does?
Yes. JavaScript makes the page work. For example, when you click a button and something changes, that is JavaScript.
Yes, a little. React helps you build parts of a page called components. You can use the same component many times. It is faster to build with React.
What do you do when your code does not work?
First I read the error message. Then I check my code. I also use the browser console to find the problem. Sometimes I search on the internet for help.
Good approach! Do you have any questions for me?
Yes. What tools does the team use? And do you use React in your projects?
